classifications.phrase: the recovery is still expected to be uneven and drawn out
A further rise in the unemployment rate is still expected
The extended period of high unemployment and excess capacity is expected to result in subdued…
inflation is forecast to be 1 per cent in 2021 and 1½ per cent in…
The Board views addressing the high rate of unemployment as an important national priority
the Board will not increase the cash rate until actual inflation is sustainably within the…
the Board is not expecting to increase the cash rate for at least 3 years
The Board is prepared to do more if necessary

payload.rationale: The statement signals a dovish stance across all three dimensions, with the strongest signals on inflation (forward guidance of no rate increases for 3+ years) and employment (prioritizing unemployment reduction), reflecting accommodation in response to subdued inflation and high unemployment.
